import React, { useState } from "react"; function Category() { const [categoryInput, setCategory] = useState({ slug: '', name: '', description: '', status: '', meta_title: '', meta_keyboard: '', meta_descrip: '', }); const handleInput = (e) => { e.persist(); setCategory({...categoryInput, [e.target.name]: e.target.value}) } return (

Add Category

Status 0=shown/1=hidden
);} export default Category;
